details: All sub-audit names (Financial Reporting, IT Infrastructure, Operations Management, Human Resources) match exactly with input data entities.
Top issue rankings follow the descending order in topByTotalIssues; persistent items match sorted persistentTop; trend buckets correctly report empty as Not Available and list stable in order.
All values are direct extractions; no derivations present, and percentages align with data (e.g., contributions sum appropriately).

suggestions: FORMATTING: Enforce stricter word count limits in generation prompt to ensure 30-60 words per paragraph.
COVERAGE: Consider explicit checklist validation in self-check to confirm all required data points.
